landscape_system.description: 12 landscapes × 7 times of day = 84 total combinations

Dusk.mood: Cool purple, deep blues, fading light

chapters.label: I
chapters.title: A Place to Stand
chapters.notes: First light breaks. Aisen stands at the edge of all things.

chapters.label: II
chapters.title: Walls That Know No Master
chapters.notes: Caspian moves through crowded streets as the city wakes.

chapters.label: III
chapters.title: The Scout's Return
chapters.notes: Harsh light reveals what night concealed.

chapters.label: IV
chapters.title: Blind Sight
chapters.notes: Below ground, day and night mean nothing.

chapters.label: V
chapters.title: What the Woods Remember
chapters.notes: Between light and dark, the forest speaks.

chapters.label: VI
chapters.title: Three Doors
chapters.notes: Bright noon light shows no mercy to the guilty.

chapters.label: VII
chapters.title: The Weight of Names
chapters.notes: Gold light falls on centuries of record.

chapters.label: VIII
chapters.title: In the Grey Hour
chapters.notes: Twilight makes the waste even more desolate.

chapters.label: IX
chapters.title: What Breaks First
chapters.notes: Renard watches the sun drown in the sea.

chapters.label: X
chapters.title: Falling Stones
chapters.notes: The afternoon light is merciless on stone.

chapters.label: XI
chapters.title: The Bargain Spoken
chapters.notes: Morning mist cloaks what Caspian seeks.

chapters.label: XII
chapters.title: Hunting the Hunter
chapters.notes: Night is Ryo's true domain.

chapters.label: XIII
chapters.title: Time Curdles
chapters.notes: Deep underground, all time is the same.

chapters.label: XIV
chapters.title: Old Tracks
chapters.notes: Noon burns away all pretense.

chapters.label: XV
chapters.title: The Heir Arrives
chapters.notes: Morning brings ceremony and tradition.

chapters.label: XVI
chapters.title: Keeper's Vigil
chapters.notes: Night deepens the weight of memory.

chapters.label: XVII
chapters.title: The Long Road
chapters.notes: Orin walks toward the rising sun.

chapters.label: XVIII
chapters.title: At World's Edge
chapters.notes: Renard stands where the world ends.

chapters.label: XIX
chapters.title: The Choice Below
chapters.notes: Deep below, the real choice awaits.

chapters.label: XX
chapters.title: Fractured Mirror
chapters.notes: Caspian sees himself reflected, fractured.

chapters.label: XXI
chapters.title: Lightning Speaks
chapters.notes: Ryo's power matches the burning sky.

chapters.label: XXII
chapters.title: When Moments Snap
chapters.notes: Time breaks like the brittle earth.

chapters.label: XXIII
chapters.title: Hunger
chapters.notes: The beast within wakes with the sun.

chapters.label: XXIV
chapters.title: The Words Unspoken
chapters.notes: In darkness, the truth cannot be hidden.

chapters.label: XXV
chapters.title: Burdens Counted
chapters.notes: By noon light, every burden is clear.

chapters.label: XXVI
chapters.title: The Wanderer's Rest
chapters.notes: At dusk, Orin finds a moment of peace.

chapters.label: XXVII
chapters.title: The Witness Sees Clearly
chapters.notes: Morning brings clarity to the witness.

chapters.label: XXVIII
chapters.title: War Comes
chapters.notes: Morning brings armies to the mountains.

chapters.label: XXIX
chapters.title: Two Selves Collide
chapters.notes: Night erases the boundaries between selves.

chapters.label: XXX
chapters.title: The Mage's Last Spell
chapters.notes: Ryo's last magic burns like the sunset.

chapters.label: XXXI
chapters.title: Breaking the Loop
chapters.notes: Noon light shows the way out of time.

chapters.label: XXXII
chapters.title: Blood and Stone
chapters.notes: The beast's lair has no need for light.

chapters.label: XXXIII
chapters.title: The Oath Held
chapters.notes: At noon, the oath stands clear and true.

chapters.label: XXXIV
chapters.title: The Ledger Complete
chapters.notes: Afternoon gold illuminates the final record.

chapters.label: XXXV
chapters.title: Hollowness Speaks
chapters.notes: In the void below, hollow speaks to hollow.

chapters.label: XXXVI
chapters.title: The Watcher Rises
chapters.notes: Renard rises with the dawn, seeing all.

chapters.label: XXXVII
chapters.title: The Army Moves
chapters.notes: Morning brings the army across broken ground.

chapters.label: XXXVIII
chapters.title: Self's Shadow
chapters.notes: Dusk brings the shadow self into being.

chapters.label: XXXIX
chapters.title: The Storm Breaks
chapters.notes: The storm breaks at sunset, beautiful and terrible.

chapters.label: XL
chapters.title: The Moment Held
chapters.notes: Kairos holds one perfect moment in the afternoon.

chapters.label: XLI
chapters.title: The Beast Within
chapters.notes: Dusk brings both beast and mercy.

chapters.label: XLII
chapters.title: An Oath Broken
chapters.notes: Even in afternoon light, the oath shatters.

chapters.label: XLIII
chapters.title: What Remains
chapters.notes: Sunset gold illuminates only what remains.

chapters.label: XLIV
chapters.title: The Empty Walk
chapters.notes: Night walks are walked alone.

chapters.label: XLV
chapters.title: All Eyes Turn
chapters.notes: Renard watches all eyes turn toward him.

chapters.label: XLVI
chapters.title: The Cost Reckoned
chapters.notes: Victory wears the colours of sunset regret.

chapters.label: XLVII
chapters.title: In Two Places
chapters.notes: Dusk brings Caspian to both places at once.

chapters.label: XLVIII
chapters.title: White Fire
chapters.notes: Ryo's white fire burns like sunset itself.

chapters.label: XLIX
chapters.title: The Loop Finally Breaks
chapters.notes: At the breaking point, new light comes.

chapters.label: L
chapters.title: The Hunt Ends
chapters.notes: Afternoon brings the hunt to its close.

chapters.label: LI
chapters.title: Oath Fulfilled
chapters.notes: Dawn shows Corvin his oath fulfilled.

chapters.label: LII
chapters.title: Through Ash to Embers
chapters.notes: New dawn breaks on a new world.
